description_long: This is a low-cut athletic running shoe featuring a predominantly white mesh upper with black, red, and yellow accents. The shoe displays a dynamic, abstract pattern on the sides and upper, with a prominent black logo on the lateral side. The midsole is thick and primarily red with a gradient effect blending into black and yellow near the outsole, suggesting cushioning and shock absorption. The interior is black, and the shoe is equipped with black laces in a standard criss-cross pattern. The heel and toe areas show some minor creasing and light marks, indicating light use. The overall design is sporty and modern, suitable for urban environments and active use.
description: A white athletic running shoe with black, red, and yellow accents, featuring a mesh upper, abstract patterns, and a thick cushioned sole. The shoe has black laces and a visible brand logo on the side.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the black interior, black laces, and the white mesh upper with abstract patterns.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the toe box, lacing area, and the transition of the red midsole to the black outsole.
description_view_2: Side profile view displaying the prominent black logo, abstract side pattern, and the full length of the red and yellow midsole.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the heel structure, layered midsole colors, and the continuation of the abstract pattern around the back.
attribute_logo: Black stylized 'Runbird' logo on the lateral side near the midfoot
